key.name: active-mode
key.description: The id of the currently active Focus mode, or empty when Focus is off.

key.name: modes
key.description: JSON array of user-defined Focus modes: [{"id":"work","name":"Work"}].

key.name: schedules
key.description: JSON array of schedules that auto-arm a mode: [{"mode":"work","start":540,"end":1020,"weekdays":[1,2,3,4,5]}] where start/end are minutes from midnight and weekdays are 1=Mon..7=Sun.
